zh.lifeSummary: 當William John Scott於1423年出生在英國英格蘭肯特斯斯時，他的父親Sir William Scott, Knight of Kent, sword-bearer to Henry V at Agincourt33歲，母親Isabel Herbert Finch18歲。他於1433年與Agnes Beaufitz結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他去世於1485年10月17日在英國肯特布拉布恩享年62歲，埋葬在英國肯特布拉布恩。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William John Scott于1423年出生在英国英格兰肯特斯斯时，他的父亲Sir William Scott, Knight of Kent, sword-bearer to Henry V at Agincourt33岁，母亲Isabel Herbert Finch18岁。他于1433年与Agnes Beaufitz结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他去世于1485年10月17日在英国肯特布拉布恩享年62岁，埋葬在英国肯特布拉布恩。

nameMeanings.name: Scott
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (Down): habitational and ethnic name from Middle English Scot ‘man from Scotland’. There is no evidence that the surname denoted either of the earlier senses of Scot as ‘(Gaelic-speaking) Irishman’ or ‘man from Alba’, the Gaelic-speaking region of Scotland north of the river Forth. This surname is also very common among African Americans.
English and Scottish: from the rare Middle English personal name Scot (Old English Scott, possibly also Old Norse Skotr), only certainly attested in northern England.

variants.name: Scutt
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Camille, Pierre.
English: nickname for a short person, from Middle English scut(e) ‘short’, or else for a swift runner, from Middle English scut ‘hare’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When William John Scott was born in 1423, in Smeeth, Kent, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir William Scott, Knight of Kent, sword-bearer to Henry V at Agincourt, was 33 and his mother, Isabel Herbert Finch, was 18. He married Agnes Beaufitz in 1433. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 8 daughters. He died on 17 October 1485, in Brabourne, Kent, England, at the age of 62, and was buried in Brabourne, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William John Scott est né en 1423, à Smeeth, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William Scott, Knight of Kent, sword-bearer to Henry V at Agincourt, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Isabel Herbert Finch, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Beaufitz en 1433. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 8 filles. Il est décédé le 17 octobre 1485, à Brabourne, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Brabourne, Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William John Scott 1423 in Smeeth, Kent, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Scott, Knight of Kent, sword-bearer to Henry V at Agincourt 33 und seine Mutter Isabel Herbert Finch 18. Er hat 1433 Agnes Beaufitz geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Er starb am 17. Oktober 1485 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Brabourne, Kent, England und wurde in Brabourne, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William John Scott è nato il nel 1423 nel Smeeth, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir William Scott, Knight of Kent, sword-bearer to Henry V at Agincourt, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Isabel Herbert Finch, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Beaufitz nel 1433. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 8 figlie. Morì il 17 ottobre 1485, nel Brabourne, Kent, England, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a Brabourne, Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William John Scottが1423年にイギリスイギリスケントスメエスで生まれた時，父Sir William Scott, Knight of Kent, sword-bearer to Henry V at Agincourtは33歳，母Isabel Herbert Finchは18歳であった。1433年にAgnes Beaufitzと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼は1485年10月17日にイギリスケントブラボウルンで62歳で死去し，イギリスケントブラボウルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William John Scott(이)가 1423년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 스메스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Scott, Knight of Kent, sword-bearer to Henry V at Agincourt(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Herbert Finch(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1433년 Agnes Beaufitz(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1485년 10월 17일 영국 켄트 브라보우른에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 브라보우른에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William John Scott nasceu em 1423, em Smeeth, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir William Scott, Knight of Kent, sword-bearer to Henry V at Agincourt, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Herbert Finch, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Beaufitz em 1433. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 8 filhas. Ele faleceu em 17 de outubro de 1485, em Brabourne, Kent, Inglaterra, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em Brabourne, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William John Scott родился в 1423 г. в местности смит, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir William Scott, Knight of Kent, sword-bearer to Henry V at Agincourt было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Isabel Herbert Finch, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Beaufitz в 1433 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Он умер 17 октября 1485 г. в местности брабурн, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности брабурн, кэнт, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William John Scott nació en 1423, en Smeeth, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir William Scott, Knight of Kent, sword-bearer to Henry V at Agincourt, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Isabel Herbert Finch, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Agnes Beaufitz en 1433. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió el 17 de octubre de 1485, en Brabourne, Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultado en Brabourne, Kent, Inglaterra.
